headline: Assessing McCormick (MKC) Valuation After A Sharp 1 Month And 1 Year Share Price Slide
summary: Why McCormick (MKC) is on investors’ radar today McCormick (MKC) has drawn fresh attention after a sustained share price slide, with the stock down about 19% over the past month and roughly 28% over the past year. See our latest analysis for McCormick. With the share price at $57.69 after a 19.3% 1 month share price decline and a 27.7% 1 year total shareholder return loss, recent weakness suggests fading momentum as investors reassess growth prospects and risk.
